mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.type AS "type", a.uid AS "u.id", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.uid2 AS "uid2.id", a.random AS "random", a.msg_seq AS "msgSeq", a.msg_time AS "msgTime", a.msg_body AS "msgBody", a.msg_type AS "msgType", a.msg_contend AS "msgContend", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.idno AS "u.idno", u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon",
group.name AS "group.name", group.idno AS "group.idno",
uid2.idno AS "uid2.idno", uid2.nickname AS "uid2.nickname", uid2.icon AS "uid2.icon"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_group group ON group.id = a.group_id LEFT JOIN t_member uid2 ON uid2.id = a.uid2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_chat_log( id, type, uid, group_id, uid2, random, msg_seq, msg_time, msg_body, msg_type, msg_contend, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{type}, #{u.id}, #{group.id}, #{uid2.id}, #{random}, #{msgSeq}, #{msgTime}, #{msgBody}, #{msgType}, #{msgContend}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_chat_log SET type = #{type}, uid = #{u.id}, group_id = #{group.id}, uid2 = #{uid2.id}, random = #{random}, msg_seq = #{msgSeq}, msg_time = #{msgTime}, msg_body = #{msgBody}, msg_type = #{msgType}, msg_contend = #{msgContend}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
